title: MWCC debug lookup
description: Search cached MWCC/Wine compiler probes and run tool-local mwcc_debug dump/diagnosis tools for specific functions.
status_message: Live runner v1: MWCC version/build-rule evidence is generated locally by toolpacks/gamecube-decomp/compiler/mwcc_debug/runners/probe_mwcc_compiler.py.
limitations: The cached runner smokes the local Wine/MWCC compiler path and build-rule metadata; live dump/diagnose APIs require the instrumented mwcceppc_debug compiler built from toolpacks/gamecube-decomp/_impl/gamecube/mwcc_debug.
Generated lookup indexes remain supplemental and should be verified against local build, pcdump, diagnose, or objdiff output for a specific target.
Dump and diagnose calls can be slow because they compile the owning translation unit and filter the pcdump for one function.

usage.agent_guidance: Use when validation points to compiler-shape behavior that local source inspection cannot explain.
